name: ADNI
full_name: Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative
notes: Gold-standard AD neuroimaging cohort. Multiple phases (ADNI-1, GO, 2, 3, 4). Predominantly white/European-American.

name: OASIS-1
full_name: Open Access Series of Imaging Studies — Cross-sectional
notes: Fully open access. Cross-sectional. Age range 18–96.

name: OASIS-3
full_name: Open Access Series of Imaging Studies — Longitudinal
notes: Longitudinal. Open access. Includes amyloid/tau PET.

name: AIBL
full_name: Australian Imaging, Biomarker & Lifestyle Flagship Study
notes: Major Australian cohort. Strong amyloid PET and lifestyle data.

name: UK Biobank
full_name: UK Biobank
notes: Population-level biobank. Application-based access. Largest MRI+genetics cohort.

name: AddNeuroMed
full_name: AddNeuroMed
notes: Pan-European multi-site study. Good geographic diversity within Europe.

name: EPAD
full_name: European Prevention of Alzheimer's Dementia
notes: Prevention-focused. Longitudinal. Multi-modal imaging. European-only.

name: PREVENT-AD
full_name: Pre-symptomatic Evaluation of Experimental or Novel Treatments for Alzheimer Disease
notes: Focus on individuals at familial risk for AD. Canadian French cohort.

name: A4 Study
full_name: Anti-Amyloid Treatment in Asymptomatic Alzheimer's
notes: Prevention trial enriched for amyloid positivity. Diverse international sites.

name: NACC
full_name: National Alzheimer's Coordinating Center
notes: Harmonised data across 34 US Alzheimer's Disease Research Centers. Includes post-mortem neuropathology.

name: ROSMAP
full_name: Religious Orders Study and Memory and Aging Project
notes: Rich post-mortem multi-omics. Unique longitudinal clinical-to-neuropath design.

name: WRAP
full_name: Wisconsin Registry for Alzheimer's Prevention
notes: Prevention-focused registry. Parental history of AD enrichment. Longitudinal.

name: ANMerge
full_name: AddNeuroMed Merged Dataset
notes: Fully open harmonised version of AddNeuroMed. Available via Synapse.

name: EMIF-AD
full_name: European Medical Information Framework for Alzheimer's Disease
notes: Multi-modal harmonised European dataset. Strong proteomics.

name: DELCODE
full_name: DZNE-Longitudinal Cognitive Impairment and Dementia Study
notes: German prevention study. Subjective cognitive decline enriched. 10 DZNE sites.

name: WHICAP
full_name: Washington Heights–Inwood Columbia Aging Project
notes: Notably diverse cohort: Caribbean Hispanic and African American populations. NYC-based.

name: Knight ADRC
full_name: Knight Alzheimer Disease Research Center at WUSTL
notes: Deep phenotyping. Rich proteomics (CSF + plasma). Well-curated post-mortem.

name: BLSA
full_name: Baltimore Longitudinal Study of Aging
notes: Oldest US longitudinal aging study. NIA-funded. Includes amyloid PET.

name: LASI-DAD
full_name: Longitudinal Aging Study in India — Diagnostic Assessment of Dementia
notes: Largest population-based dementia study in India. Critical for LMIC representation.

name: ReDLat
full_name: Red Latina de Demencias Tempranas (Latin American Network for Early-Onset Dementia)
notes: Crucial for Latin American diversity. Includes Indigenous-descent and mestizo populations.
